Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data shows TNGX dominating the momentum rankings with a score of 98.4 and rank #1, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes—most notably 991.53% over one year and 115.62% over three months—while maintaining perfect SMA alignment above all key moving averages. The stock demonstrates exceptional ratio consistency (5 of 5 passes) with each timeframe showing 2-9x returns versus the prior period, and it has dramatically outperformed major indices by 973.94% versus SPY over one year. TYRA ranks second with more moderate but still strong returns (250.92% one-year, 66.22% three-month) and similar SMA strength, though it lags TNGX significantly on absolute performance and outperformance metrics. Both leaders maintain healthy ratio consistency and resilience on down SPY days (scores near 97-99), with TNGX showing a weaker correlation to consumer staples (XLP at -0.24) and materials (XLB at -0.205), suggesting sector-specific strength rather than broad market dependency. The data indicates a highly selective environment where these two outliers significantly exceed typical momentum candidates across the 700+ ticker universe.
